case_title: ATENCIO JANO K VS NEGRI ARMANDO et al

docket_entries.description: CASE WAS INADVERTENTLY SCHEDULED TO JUDGE CHOPPELAS, SHOULD HAVE BEEN SCHEDULED TO JUDGE COLBERT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ATENCIO JANO K RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEGRI ARMANDO PACIFIC CRATING AND SHIPPING $1,667.29 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,667.29 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,667.29 FILED BY ATENCIO JANO K AS TO DEFENDANT NEGRI ARMANDO PACIFIC CRATING AND SHIPPING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NEGRI ARMANDO PACIFIC CRATING AND SHIPPING
JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATIFACTION JUDGMENT SEND UP TO JUDGE FOR SIGNATURE.
JUDG. DEBTOR'S SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT SIGNED BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY.
